name: rewardflow
description: Leverage state graph topology to propagate terminal rewards backwards to all visited states. Agents learn state-level values without training expensive process reward models. Achieve 27.7% improvement on complex reasoning tasks through topology-aware reward attribution.
paperTitle: RewardFlow - Topology-Aware Reward Propagation for Agentic RL
keywords: reinforcement learning, reward propagation, state graphs, agentic RL, process rewards
